chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1850 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 18.12.2025 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, Assistant A.G Sindh *** None present on behalf of the petitioner. No intimation is received. Same was the position the last two consecutive dates of hearing, which prima facie reflects that petitioner has lost interest in the matter. Accordingly this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. However, SSP Jamshoro is directed to continue with his efforts and recover the alleged missing person and produce him before the competent Court of law. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
